'''Zygian Savings and Loan''' was a banking institution based on [[Treylon II]]. It had several branches throughout the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], including [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="GG7" />

{{Company-stub}}
